listings.title: Colecovision Adam Computer Module
Tektronix 2213 60MHz Dual Trace  Oscilloscope, Manual, probes.
listings.body: Has been in storage for a while. Powers on fine. Channel 1 perfect. Channel 2 seems to be weak. Otherwise, in great shape. No missing parts. Come with 2 original probes, manual, and power cord. Even a spare fuse package.

listings.title: Samsung 40" TV for sale
listings.body: A 40" SAMSUNG LED flat screen TV for sale and it is good condition. Includes: - TV - Power cable - Remote - TV Stand -Ruke 3 - DVD player

listings.title: Alders carpenters and builders guide books 1945
listings.body: Set of Alders carpenters and builders guide books 1945. Pics are just random pages from each book. Good condition for age. Believe they were given out when you joined carpenters union. Covers everything from tools to materials to construction practices

listings.title: GE 12.000 BTU Air Conditioner - $225
listings.body: Like new GE appliance, 115V. This is a Window unit, it won't work inside of a wall mount. Remote control included. Cash and pick up only. Fixed price. Energy Star.

listings.title: HomeBrew Equipment. No Separating. Must Take All
listings.body: Counter Pressure Filler Bottle Capper Bottle Corker Wax seal Bottling bucket Hoses for everything *Steel Tall Auto Siphon Torpedo 2.65 keg Steel Ball Cap keg connect PH Strip Electronic Pen 2 Bottling Racks Magnetic Spinner Small oxygen tank Steel Bottle Filler wand Assorted Brewbags Gravity Reader Glass Strainer Brewer Gloves Large Funnel 5 Gallon Wide Mouth 5 Gallon 3 Gallon 2x 1Gallon Carboy Metal shelf and organizer unit Stirring Paddle Anvil Brewing Kettle 10 Gallon Cooling Coil Fride temp controller Bottle Rinser Bottle Washer Weight Scale 2x box 22oz 1x box 187ml 1x box Bottles

listings.title: Maytag washer / Whirlpool electric dryer
listings.body: Maytag washer is from 2014 or so, Whirlpool dryer is from 1991. Both in great shape, we just got a new stacked washer/dryer that fits our space better after a remodel. Dryer is built like a tank like they used to make 'em, I expect it to outlive our new one. Must be picked up. Offer is for both only.

listings.title: Zhu Zhu Pets
listings.body: Electronic Hamster toy from 2009. New in box!
